In the following verses effects of the Moon's transit are
given.]
imi
When the Moon passes through the south of the stars Jyestha,
Mula and the two Asadhas (Purva and Uttara), there would be
destruction of seeds, aquatic animals and forests as well as danger
from fire.
[The Moon is invariably auspicious if she moves to the left
of planets and stars. See XVIII—1 infra.]
TO 5T5ft I
If the Moon should pass through the south of the stars Visa-
kha and Anuradha, evil effects would follow. However, if she
passes through the middle of Magha and Visakha, only beneficial
effects will accrue to the world.
[See the on this—
ll]
